metadata.description: Site-level Nigerian fields producing both oil and gas (fuel_type = oil and gas) with status, operator, and ownership context.
metadata.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
metadata.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
metadata.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023. 145 of 180 GOGET fields (81%) are classified oil and gas -- the majority case for Nigerian fields.
metadata.label: Oil & Gas Fields (mixed)
